Privacy-friendly analytics status — no GA4 or Clarity

Privacy Policy

This preview does not enable production media processing. Cloudflare Web Analytics is the intended privacy-friendly analytics path after secure beacon token handoff; no GA4 or Microsoft Clarity tag is used by this build.

Educational signal, not forensic proof.

Sample report only — this is demo content and not an analysis of your video.

Upload rights and consent

This report is a preliminary AI/deepfake likelihood signal. It can be wrong, especially for compressed, edited, low-resolution, edited, or screen-recorded videos. Do not use it as the sole basis for legal, safety, employment, moderation, or other high-impact decisions.

Preview/sample mode

Sample report only — this is demo content and not an analysis of your video.

Privacy-friendly analytics status

Cloudflare Web Analytics site setup is partial, but the beacon token was not securely handed off for this build. No GA4 or Microsoft Clarity tag is emitted.

Retention and deletion to be confirmed

Real upload retention, deletion timelines, provider processing, and no-training terms must be confirmed before production media analysis is enabled.

Third-party provider disclosure required before launch

Cloudflare hosts the site. Any future detector provider, payment, email, storage, or analytics subprocessors must be disclosed before launch.

AI Video Detector

Results are preliminary educational signals, not forensic, legal, or moderation proof. This site is independently operated and is not affiliated with similarly named AI video detector sites or any video platform.

Preview/sample mode is active; automated detection remains disabled until provider validation and compliance review are complete.
